form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a head at this track March 13 over 1400m defeating Ardour Grow carrying 57kg at $1.60. Before that favourite; scored a big 6 len win at this track January 19 over 1500m defeating Dia No Gotoku with 57kg at $1.20. Hard to beat if he brings his A-game.
